title: What Are Managed IT Services and Why Do Indian Enterprises Need Them?
excerpt: Managed IT services move your organisation from reactive break-fix IT to a proactive, continuously-monitored environment backed by SLAs. Here is what that means in practice for Indian businesses.

title: Hybrid Cloud Architecture for Indian Enterprises: A Practical Guide
excerpt: A hybrid cloud model lets Indian enterprises keep sensitive workloads on-premise for compliance while using cloud elasticity for everything else. This guide covers architecture patterns, costs, and migration approach.

title: Cybersecurity Compliance for Indian SMEs: CERT-In, DPDPA, and ISO 27001
excerpt: Indian regulators are tightening cybersecurity requirements. This guide explains what CERT-In directives, DPDPA obligations, and ISO 27001 certification mean for mid-sized Indian businesses — and how to achieve compliance cost-effectively.
